did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a bibliometric analysis that maps trends and academic landscapes of AI applications in basal cell carcinoma research. It did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its own study results; instead, it used bibliometric tools (VOSviewer, CiteSpace, bibliometrix R) to analyze publication data. While it discusses AI methods like deep learning and CNNs in the context of other studies, the paper itself does not employ these computational modeling techniques for diagnostic or analytical purposes.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
